---
title: "William Savage"
---

## William Savage

**Dates:** (1817-1887)

### Description

photographer and publisher in Winchester

### Biography

He published a series of illustrated guide books including J. Frewen Moor, <i>Guide to Hursley</i> (1869), and he photographed CMY.

### Letters

- [To Frederick Orridge Macmillan or Alexander Macmillan Jr, June 30th 1898](../letters/3377_To_Frederick_Orridge_Macmillan_or_Alexander_Macmillan_Jr.html)
- Letter from Jan 31st  [1870]
- Letter from Jany 4th [1870]
- Letter from May 13th [1867]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
